name: trash-panda Robocop
description: Bounded OpenClaw tools for a Raspberry Pi trash-panda Robocop field node.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Raspberry Pi trash-panda Robocop FastAPI service.

apiKey.description: Same API key configured on the Raspberry Pi service as RG_API_KEY.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for calls from the Mac mini OpenClaw instance to the Pi.
